Class RabbitCommonProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.cloud.stream.binder.rabbit.properties.RabbitCommonProperties
Direct Known Subclasses:
RabbitConsumerProperties, RabbitProducerProperties
public abstract class RabbitCommonProperties extends Object
Since:
1.2
Author:
Gary Russell, Soby Chacko
